title: hieracium pilosella subsp. angustellum
intro: Hieracium pilosella subsp. angustellum, also known as a subspecies of the common hawkweed, is a perennial plant species native to the mountainous regions of Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which can help to soothe various health issues, including digestive problems and skin irritations. The medicinal properties of Hieracium pilosella subsp. angustellum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and protect against oxidative stress, making it a potential natural remedy for various health conditions. Herbal preparations of Hieracium pilosella subsp. angustellum include teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties and promote overall well-being.
